scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter backend build" "pnpm --filter frontend build"
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter backend start" "pnpm --filter frontend start"
